title: Application Lifecycle Schema
description: Schema for application lifecycle, catalog, tenant application, environment, and deployment. Use alongside the application meta model: definition content validates against the application meta model; lifecycle artifacts validate against this schema.

applicationCatalog.description: Application catalog: installable applications (entries offered to tenants).

tenantApplication.description: Tenant application instance (installed from catalog, from scratch, or modified).

deploy.description: Deployment of a tenant app release to an environment.

extensionRelease.description: Single extension release (created when releasing extensions from an application; added to extension catalog).

extensionCatalog.description: Extension catalog: entries offered for applications to reference (extensionReferences).
